reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio. Lavado de autos y camionetas excelente. Te invitan un café para que la espera no sea tediosa. Y si cargaste combustible tenés un 10% de descuento.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The car and truck wash is superb. They offer you coffee to make the wait more pleasant. And if you fill up with fuel, you get a 10% discount.
